choices.text: alert(msg, alert.freq_once_per_bar_close) — fires only after bar closes; no intra-bar flicker; matches backtest signals. freq_all spams; freq_once_per_bar may still flicker.
Configure TradingView Alert with Webhook URL pointing to broker / proxy endpoint. Pine alert message becomes POST body (JSON ideal). Endpoint parses + places order via broker API. 100ms-2s latency.

questions.explanation: Webhook URL → broker endpoint = automated execution.
